title: 18PCS Christmas Pens, Assorted Festive Designs, Smooth Writing Ballpoint Pens for School, Office, Holiday Gifts, Stocking Fillers, Party Favours
features: Festive Writing Collection: This set includes 18 Christmas pens featuring six delightful designs, with three pens of each style; Ideal for adding a festive touch to your writing during the holiday season.

Smooth Writing Performance: These christmas pens designed with a reliable ballpoint mechanism that provides consistent ink flow for a seamless writing experience; Suitable for various types of paper and durable.

Versatile Holiday Use: These christmas pens perfect for school projects, office documentation, Christmas card signing, and holiday crafting; These pens make a practical yet cheerful addition to your seasonal stationery.

Thoughtful Gift Option: Packaged as a ready-to-give set, these Christmas pens serve as charming stocking stuffers, party favours, or small gifts for colleagues, teachers, and friends during the festive period.

Durable Construction: These christmas pens made with quality materials to withstand regular use; The comfortable barrel design ensures ease of handling for extended writing sessions during holiday preparations.
